use_cases: Form submission buttons for web applications
Navigation action triggers in user interfaces
Interactive UI elements with multiple visual variants
Accessible button component with focus-visible ring states
Customizable button styling via variant and size props
ai_summary: A reusable atomic button component with multiple style variants (default, destructive, outline, secondary, ghost, link) and size options. Built with Radix UI Slot for composition flexibility, using class-variance-authority for type-safe variant handling. Provides focus-visible states, disabled states, and hover transitions for accessibility and user feedback.
